name: 13″ x 13″  Premium Hawk - Black
description: Crafted from solid extruded aluminum, the HAWK002 is robust and resists corrosion. The black anodized finish features our exclusive IMR Technology which provides durability and improved material removal. Rounded corners provide safety and comfort. The ergonomic ProSoft handle with extra foam pad helps prevent hand fatigue. And the hollow design of the handle allows you to rest the tool on scaffolding posts.

name: 14" Premium Mud Pan
description: TapeTech Premium Mud Pans feature stainless steel construction and a contoured bottom to make mixing, cleaning and removal of joint compound easier. The contoured shape is more ergonomic and comfortable to hold. The continuous heli-arc weld provides maximum durability and value. Features: Premium, Polished Stainless Steel Construction For Easy Use and Cleaning Heli-Arc Welds For Durability Contoured Bottom For Easy Mixing, Comfort and Cleaning Ergonomic Rounded Bottom Profile Straight Edges To Easily Clean Compound From Knife

name: MWS Accessory Kit
description: TapeTech has now included a new Accessory Kit with every Wash Station purchased. The kit includes: a. Hanging Basket – to keep your already cleaned tools clean and allows them to hang to dry. Features: Hanging Basket – Allows your already clean tools to stay clean and not be put back into the basin with other tools. The basket allows for the tools to begin drying while hanging. The basket can be hung at various locations on the wash basin. Nozzle Brush – The brush simply snaps onto the end of the spray nozzle. When used in combination with the spray nozzle, the new brush helps remove stubborn compound faster. The brush also acts as a splash shield against over spray. Drain Riser – The drain riser is inserted into the metal drain in the basin and helps to prevent compound from draining into the bucket, keeping your water cleaner longer. By removing the riser, the retained compound can now be drained into a disposal bucket.

name: MWS Spray Hose Kit
description: The NEW Spray Hose Kit has been improved to offer a number of features for the MWS01-TT Mobile Wash Station. Features: Improved Nozzle – New pressure adjustment on the nozzle allows for the proper amount of water pressure for the specific cleaning application. There is also a directional feature of where to spray. Hose – A more robust hose has been added to the kit and will now be the standard option packed in the box. Upgraded Brass Connectors – New and improved connectors have been added to the hose for attachment to the MWS01-TT Mobile Wash Station.

name: Locking Wheel Kit for Mobile Wash Station
description: Locking Wheel Kit for Mobile Wash Station This high-performance locking wheel kit will enhance your mobile wash station by offering secure positioning and easy mobility. This kit comes with four sturdy caster wheels, two of which have locking mechanisms to keep your wash station steady while in use, making it ideal for commercial or portable cleaning setups. Features: • Smooth Maneuverability: Swivel casters make it simple to move on a variety of surfaces, such as asphalt, tile, and concrete. • Dependable Braking System: The station is securely held in place by two wheels that are fitted with easy-use locks. • Sturdy Construction: Made from industrial-grade steel and rubber for long-lasting performance under heavy loads and damp conditions.

name: 5" and 6" Margin Trowel Set
description: Contains one each of the 5″ and 6″ margin trowels. These are ideal for applying and smoothing stucco and EIFS materials in small areas where traditional trowels do not fit. The high carbon tempered steel blade provides enhanced toughness, durability and performance compared to standard high carbon trowels. Features the TapeTech ProSoft grip for all-day comfort and reduced fatigue.

name: 2" Premium Inside Corner Compound Roller with Frame
description: TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. The 2″ compound roller is perfect for applying joint compound to internal corners prior to using a corner flusher or finisher. This roller includes a specially designed extended roller frame; the roller is not replaceable. Key Features: Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity : TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap – nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap – allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Robust Frame Design: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. Our frames are a full 5/16” thick – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.

name: 12" x 4.7" Premium Gold Stainless Steel Curved Finishing Trowel
description: TapeTech premium curved drywall trowels allow you to professionally feather and taper drywall, EIFS and stucco joints, leaving extra joint compound where you need it most – over butt joints and uneven adjacent gypsum or EPS panels. The triple-hardened stainless steel blades ensure maximum performance, and the ProSoft handle is slip-resistant and comfortable to reduce user fatigue.

name: EIN7590 0.75" 90 Inside Corner Edger
description: TapeTech Inside Corner Edgers for 90° Corners are designed to produce smooth, uniform and square 90° inside corners for EIFS, Stucco, Plaster, Concrete and other materials. Handcrafted from 0.65mm stainless steel, TapeTech corner edgers are robust enough to efficiently create perfect results in thick materials. Custom wood handles are ergonomic for all-day use and the unique TapeTech black and gold design helps distinguish your tools from others on the jobsite. Available in five sizes for ultimate versatility in nearly every situation.

name: 18" x 4.7" Premium Gold Stainless Steel Finishing Trowel
description: TapeTech Premium MIDFLEXX finishing trowels produce a superior finish on drywall, plaster, EIFS, stucco, concrete, epoxy and micro-cement due to the added flexibility of the blade compared to standard trowels. Crafted using 0.4 mm European triple-hardened gold stainless steel, these trowels ensure maximum performance and long life. The ProSoft handle is slip-resistant and comfortable to reduce user fatigue. The blades on the TapeTech MIDFLEXX finishing trowels are attached to the handle mount using a special technology that robotically and precisely welds the rivets to the blade surface. These superior quality stainless steel rivets are then pressed into the handle mount, resulting in the strongest trowels available. Other brands use two-sided tape to attach the blade to the mount.

name: SideWinder™ Extendable Brakeless Box Handle
description: The SideWinder is a brakeless box handle with rotating head that allows you to comfortably finish high horizontal joints by keeping the box and handle at the optimal angle for performance. The SideWinder has the same features as our other brakeless handles with the added convenience of the rotating head.

name: Mobile Wash Station
description: The TapeTech MWS01-TT Mobile Wash Station is the lightest and most portable wash station available. It is the perfect solution for cleaning tools and equipment on the jobsite, especially when water supplies are limited. Working from just a 5-gallon bucket of water, the MWS01-TT generates the ideal water pressure to effectively clean drywall finishing tools, paint brushes, rollers, pans and more! The MWS01-TT also helps finishers and painters comply with environmental laws by providing a convenient, professional wash station that does not wash the joint compound or paint into the soil. The legs of the MWS01-TT open and close effortlessly for quick set up, break down and transport. The MWS01-TT weighs just 34 pounds. Features: Improved pump that only circulates while the trigger is being operated, extending the life of the pump and providing twice the cleaning power of the original pump Improved spray hose & nozzle with more control over pressure and directional spray Now includes Accessory Kit (MWS-ACC) with basket, drain riser, and nozzle brush to dry your tools, keep compound out of your water bucket, and remove stubborn compound Locking Wheel Kit – MWS01-LW also included lets you easily move your Mobile Wash Station around and lock when needed

name: Bazooka Continuous Flow Pump
description: The Bazooka Continuous Flow Pump was designed in conjunction with Graco specifically to pump joint compound for high production drywall finishing applications. The Endurance Pump, MaxPower Motor and Advantage Drive System combine to create the most rugged and reliable pump on the market. The internal hopper filter maximizes material usage by allowing joint compound collected during the wipe down process to be re-used without fear of debris entering the pump. The 25 gallon hopper can be used as a tool wash station and includes an air tight lid so compound can be preserved for next day use. With the optional CTFIL, standard ATF tools can be filled while the continuous flow tools are in use. Also Available: CTEPMP: CFS Pump – Europe (230V / 50 Hz). Available through European Distributors and Dealers only. CTAPMP: CFS Pump – Australia (230V / 50 Hz) with 242005 adapter. Available through Australian and New Zealand Distributors and Dealers only. CTUPMP: CFS Pump – UK (110V). Available through UK Distributors and Dealers only.

name: ATF Tool Maintenance Kit

name: TapeTech 12" Compound Roller with Frame
description: TapeTech 12" Premium Compound Roller with Frame CROLL12CG TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. Key Features: Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap - nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap – allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers. name: TapeTech Extendable Angle Box Handle XHTT/CAA
description: TapeTech XHTT/CAA is an all-new aluminum extendable angle box handle that is part of an interchangeable handle system. One support handle can be used with Corner Rollers, Angle Boxes, Angle Heads, and Nail Spotters! The base handle XHTT fits the corner roller without adapters, as well as the new design corner applicator and nail spotter without adapters. The new, optimal 1.25" diameter makes TapeTech XHTT handles the most ergonomic in the industry. The XHTT features a D-shaped fitting that securely positions the handle in the Corner Applicator and positively prevents the tool from rotating during use. TapeTech XHTT/CAA Interchangeable Handle Kit Features: Includes the CAA adapter for older style corner finisher boxes or angle boxes Extendable from 43"-77" Lightweight and maneuverable at only 2.15 lbs Use a single handle with attachments for a variety of tools. 1.25" Diameter is comfortable and ergonomic D-Shaped fitting end that eliminates corner box movement Handle Fitments and Adapters: The Corner Applicator adapter (CAA-TT) is included with the new Corner Applicators (CA07TT and CA08TT). Or you can purchase it separately to use the new handle system with your existing Corner Applicators. The Nail Spotter adapter (NSA-TT) is included with the new Nail Spotters (Models NS02TT and NS03TT). Or you can purchase it separately to use the new handle system with your existing Nail Spotters. If you have the current 35TT or 50TT Corner Applicators, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the CAA-TT adapter. If you have the current 63TT or 68TT Nail Spotters, you need the FHTT or the XHTT plus the NSA-TT adapter.

name: TapeTech 3" EasyClean Nail Spotter NS03TT
description: TapeTech 3" EasyClean® Nail Spotter NS02TT Allows you to spot ceilings without the use of stilts faster and more efficient than spotting nails by hand. Featuring the EasyClean® Lid, quick release latch, and gasket system (similar to a flat box). This allows easy access and hassle-free clean up. This Nail Spotter gives you the flexibility for any size job, and is an ideal single spotter system. The traditional style skid plate is both a pivot point and a screw detector, which helps prevent blade damage. The spotter body is made of high quality stainless steel that will not rust or deteriorate. Each TapeTech Nail Spotter includes a Nail Spotter Adapter NSA-TT which attaches to both Interchangeable Fiberglass Handle FHTT (not included) and Interchangeable Extendable Handle XHTT (not included).
